caption.full:
Corbin Mims confronted Sincere Rhea about his behavior toward Melanie.

Corbin Mims revealed he confronted his friend Sincere Rhea about his treatment of Melanie Moreno. He stated that Parmida Keshani's different perspective on their relationship changed his mind. Corbin and Parmida Keshani were later voted out of the villa on July 5.

Was Corbin right to call out Sincere to the cameras, or should he have kept it between the guys?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

caption.firstComment: That moment at movie night looked brutal — team Corbin all the way for shutting down the bs, but I’m curious: would you have stayed silent or pulled Sincere aside privately?
